content: The state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems emerging in 2024-2025 can be re-engineered to store and rank curiosity-driven intrinsic rewards from ICM (Intrinsic Curiosity Module) and RND (Random Network Distillation) separately by episodic novelty sources, rather than lumping all intrinsic rewards into a single scalar value. This creates a 'novelty memory bank' that lets curious RL agents actively revisit high-impact uncertain experiences instead of only discarding them after a single curiosity update.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
